title: Air India embraces AI to enhance ops efficiency, increase revenues, reduce costs
description: Air India is embracing artificial intelligence to transform its operations. The airline is using AI to cut costs, improve customer service, and boost revenue. Generative AI is helping validate pilot duty norms and automate tasks. AI is also empowering employees, changing job roles. This technology adoption is a key part of Air India's ambitious transformation plan.

title: Air India's Technological Ascent: Harnessing AI for Transformation
description: Air India, led by Tata Group, is revolutionizing its operations by integrating artificial intelligence to boost efficiency, customer service, and revenue while cutting costs. The transformation plan includes AI-driven initiatives such as generative and agentic AI, enhancing processes like Flight Duty Time Limitations and contact volume management.
content:
Air India, under the stewardship of Tata Group, is leveraging artificial intelligence to spearhead an ambitious transformation strategy aimed at enhancing its operational efficiency, customer experience, and financial performance.

title: UAE's Billion Dirham Leap Towards Industrial Resilience
description: The United Arab Emirates is launching a one billion dirham national fund, announced by Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum. The fund aims to boost industrial resilience by focusing on localizing key industries, strengthening supply chains, and integrating artificial intelligence in production and planning.
content:
The United Arab Emirates is set to establish a national fund worth one billion dirhams, equivalent to $272.30 million. This development was announced by Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum on X this Sunday.

title: Russia weaponising AI deepfakes in grey zone warfare to shatter Western support for Ukraine, report warns
description: The Kremlin has launched a sophisticated "asymmetric assault" on Western democracy, deploying advanced artificial intelligence and deepfake technology to flood the information space with realistic lies about the war in Ukraine.
content:
According to a landmark study by the Henry Jackson Society, Moscow has pivoted toward "grey zone" tactics as its conventional military faces setbacks and its economy remains isolated by global sanctions.

title: ‘Artificial Intelligence boosts justice efficiency, but risks demand human vigilance’: CJI Surya Kant outlines AI’s role in Indian judiciary
description: Shifting focus to technology's transformative potential, CJI Surya Kant highlighted AI's practical applications in streamlining judicial processes. He noted its value in administrative tasks and legal research, which enhance efficiency without overstepping core functions.
content:
Returning to his heartland roots, he honoured the grit of rural graduates while outlining a balanced approach to AI- celebrating its efficiencies yet firmly drawing boundaries to protect human judgment.
